section_name: Computing Face Area of Certain Signs
chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text: Each face area of a double-faced, back-to-back, or V-type sign is considered to be a separate sign for the purpose of computing the face area under Section 394.042 (Face Restrictions) or 394.045 (Space Between Signs) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.046 — Computing Face Area of Certain Signs

Each face area of a double-faced, back-to-back, or V-type sign is considered to be a separate sign for the purpose of computing the face area under Section 394.042 (Face Restrictions) or 394.045 (Space Between Signs) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Each face area of a double-faced, back-to-back, or V-type sign is considered to be a separate sign for the purpose of computing the face area under Section 394.042 (Face Restrictions) or 394.045 (Space Between Signs) .

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
